seo.title: Grip Strength for Clinical Trials - Pharma & CROs | Able Care
seo.description: Objective, remote-capable functional health measurement for clinical trials and CRO-led studies. Grip strength as a decentralized endpoint for GLP-1 monitoring and oncology.

blocks.headline: Decentralized functional endpoints for clinical trials.
blocks.subtitle: One of the most informative clinical data points can now be captured with one of the most accurate, sensitive, and robust sensors on the market.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Clinician reviewing assessment data on tablet

blocks.heading: How it works in clinical trials

steps.title: Protocol design
steps.description: Work with the Able Care research team to define endpoint capture protocols. Standardized across all trial sites from day one.

steps.title: Site deployment
steps.description: Ship GripAble sensors to trial sites or directly to participants for decentralized capture. Minimal site training required.

steps.title: Data Capture
steps.description: Participants complete assessments at home or on-site. Data captured digitally, time stamped, and uploaded automatically.

steps.title: Data delivery
steps.description: Clean, structured endpoint data delivered in your preferred format. Ready for statistical analysis with full audit trail.

blocks.heading: The evidence base
blocks.pulledStat: Grip strength predicts all-cause mortality more reliably than systolic blood pressure.

citations.title: Grip strength as a surrogate marker for GLP-1 related muscle loss
Sarcopenia and grip strength in oncology patients: a systematic review
Digital grip dynamometry for remote functional assessment in clinical trials

blocks.heading: Talk to the research team about your trial.
Grip Strength: The Essential Biomarker for Longevity
blocks.promoBody: Download the full clinical summary — peer-reviewed evidence linking grip strength to biological age, mortality, frailty and chronic disease risk, with guidance on integrating grip testing into routine assessment.

title: Grip Strength as a Clinical Trial Endpoint
